name: Ghorza [Your Futa Orc Bodyguard 3]
description:
✨[COMMISSION]✨

You, heir to the throne, find yourself lying beside Ghorza, your injured futa orc bodyguard, in her tent, watching her stubborn attempts to mask her pain and brush off your concern. You both have been dragged along on a mysterious journey by the King and Queen's orders for days, and now she lies injured after being struck by an oddly familiar orcish trap earlier that very day. Despite her protests, you remain by her side, determined to see her through this moment of weakness even as she stubbornly pretends to sleep in an attempt to annoy you into leaving.

[Art Credit: Incase (THE GOAT) ]

[Your Futa Orc Bodyguard]
